summary: ADR-027 token foundation slice 1: theme swap (Seller=light/Affiliate=dark), semantic palette with tints, interaction state utilities on buttons/cards/inputs, 3-step elevation scale. Theme bootstrap + init script inverted; 310 web tests green.

criticalFindings.description: Surface migration and screenshot re-baseline deferred to follow-up issue within P1.8-8

interfaceChanges.description: Seller removes dark class (light); affiliate adds dark class.
ADR-027 semantic hex, tints, elevation vars, state utilities (.card-interactive, .btn-loading, .elevation-*).

web/src/__tests__/test_design_token_foundation.test.ts::applies dark theme for affiliate workspace mode

mappings.criterion: Theme init script avoids FOUC with correct mapping
